I found your appointment — "Dentist Appointment" on 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00 at Downtown Dental Clinic (calendar event id 5).

Before I reschedule it, please tell me:
1) When would you like it moved to? Give a specific new date and start time (e.g., "May 21 at 10:30"), or say if you want me to "find the next available morning/afternoon within N days."  
2) Should I notify/contact the dental clinic when I reschedule? Right now the event only includes you, so rescheduling the event will only notify event participants. If you want me to contact the clinic, please provide the clinic email/phone or say I should add them as a participant (and give their email).  
3) Keep the same duration (1 hour)? (Yes by default.)

Tell me your preference and I’ll reschedule it.
